def setUp(self):
        super(BuildExtTestCase, self).setUp()
        self.tmp_dir = self.mkdtemp()
        self.xx_created = False
        sys.path.append(self.tmp_dir)
        self.addCleanup(sys.path.remove, self.tmp_dir)
        if sys.version > "2.6":
            import site
            self.old_user_base = site.USER_BASE
            site.USER_BASE = self.mkdtemp()
            from distutils.command import build_ext
            build_ext.USER_BASE = site.USER_BASE

def setUp(self):
        # The test runner sets settings.DEBUG to False, but we want to gather
        # queries so we'll set it to True here and reset it at the end of the
        # test case.
        self.create_base_data()

def tearDown(self):
        self.settings_override.disable()

def mysql_registry(mysql_server):
    db_name = "".join(random.choices(string.ascii_lowercase, k=10))

    _create_mysql_database(mysql_server, db_name)

    connection_url = (
        "/".join(mysql_server.get_connection_url().split("/")[:-1]) + f"/{db_name}"
    )

    registry_config = SqlRegistryConfig(
        registry_type="sql",
        path=connection_url,
        cache_ttl_seconds=2,
        cache_mode="sync",
        sqlalchemy_config_kwargs={"echo": False, "pool_pre_ping": True},
        thread_pool_executor_worker_count=0,
        purge_feast_metadata=False,
    )

    yield SqlRegistry(registry_config, "project", None)

def setUp(self):
    # and set up some instance variables to clean up our tests
    self.appid = "my-app"
    self.domain = "domain"
    self.ejabberd_ip = 'ejabberd_ip'
    self.xmpp_port = 5222
    self.uasecret = "boo"
    self.message = "the message"
    self.message_type = 'chat'
    self.my_jid = self.appid + '@' + self.domain

    # throw in a fake appid into the environment
    os.environ['APPNAME'] = self.appid

def tearDown(self):
        sys.argv = self.argv[0]
        sys.argv[:] = self.argv[1]
        super(DistributionTestCase, self).tearDown()
